No issues are present in the code structure or logic.\n- **Malicious behavior:** No signs of malware, backdoors, or malicious code are evident.\n- **Obfuscation:** The code is straightforward, autogenerated, and not obfuscated.\n- **Vulnerabilities:** Since this is a factory for interacting with a contract, any vulnerabilities would be in the contract itself, not in this interaction layer.\n\n### Specific analysis per report:\n\n#### **Report 1**\n- **Summary:** No malicious behavior, standard factory, no anomalies.\n- **Risk score:** 0.1 — appropriate given it's just a factory.\n- **Malware score:** 0 — no malicious activity.\n- **Conclusion:** Accurate;
